arts.ttl: Alan Shearer points the blame for Jack Grealish's cruel injury: "It's not acceptable!"
arts.sum: England star Jack Grealish lasted just half an hour during Manchester City's Champions League clash with Real Madrid at the Etihad and Alan Shearer was left angry at what he thinks caused the issue

arts.ttl: Manchester City fans taunt Vinicius Jr with Rodri Ballon d’Or banner during Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: The Manchester City midfielder pipped the Real Madrid forward to the prestigious award last October

arts.ttl: Gerard Piqué labels Real Madrid star ‘a future Ballon d’Or winner’
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Gerard Piqué has on Tuesday tipped Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. to one day realise his dream of lifting the Ballon d’Or. Wide-man Vinícius, of course, was pipped…

arts.ttl: Man City fans taunt Real Madrid and Vinicius Junior over Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Manchester City fans taunted Real Madrid and Vinicius Junior ahead of their Champions League playoff on Tuesday by unfurling a giant banner of Rodri kissing the Ballon d’Or. The Spain midfielder was voted the best player in the world last year ahead of Madrid forward Vinicius.

arts.ttl: WATCH: Real Madrid rue early misses as Manchester City strike first blow
arts.sum: Real Madrid are not had a good start to their Champions League play-off round tie against Manchester City, having fallen behind in the first leg at the Etihad Stadium. It was a fast start from the defending champions, and they had two big chances to break the deadlock. Kylian Mbappe was denied by Ederson after […] The post WATCH: Real Madrid rue early misses as Manchester City strike first blow appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Manchester City Fans Target Real Madrid With Ballon d'Or Banner for Champions League Match
arts.sum: Manchester City fans held up a banner of Rodri winning the Ballon d'Or before City's match with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr’s agents hold talks with rival European club
arts.sum: The representatives of Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. have held informal discussions with another of the continent’s leading clubs, over a potential future transfer. That’s according to Sky transfer insider…

arts.ttl: Chelsea in Real Madrid battle for €84m Premier League ace
arts.sum: Chelsea and Real Madrid have been informed that Murillo is 'likely to leave' Nottingham Forest in the summer, according to a report. Chelsea and Real Madrid are the European behemoths currently associated with the defender and TEAMtalk claims that'some sources' familiar with the player's situation believe that he is 'likely to leave' Forest in the summer.

arts.ttl: Football España x CNN: Barcelona’s attack slices gap and Real Madrid’s refereeing complaints
arts.sum: After another brilliant weekend of La Liga action, Football España joined CNN World Sport to discuss the aftermath of the Madrid derby, Barcelona’s title and naturally, Real Madrid’s ongoing campaign against the officiating in Spain. arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr's private response to Man City fans' brutal banner at Champions League clash
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior missed out on the 2024 Ballon d'Or to Manchester City star Rodri, who's currently out injured but will see his team-mates face Real Madrid in the Champions League
